name: Nude Rose
tagline: Soft pink with whisper gold tips
description: A barely-there blush, finished with hand-painted gold detail. The everyday luxury — quiet, polished, intentional.
details: Handmade soft gel, set in our Jodhpur atelier.
Up to 3 weeks of wear, fully reusable.
Includes prep kit, glue, mini file, cuticle stick, instruction card.

name: Bridal Pearl
description: An heirloom finish for the day you wear forever. Ivory soft gel with hand-set crystal accents.
details: Crafted by appointment, lead time 5–7 days.

name: Chrome Lune
description: A liquid metal finish, pressed by hand and sealed for a true mirror lustre.

name: Velvet Cat Eye
description: Deep wine, drawn through with a slow streak of light. Magnetic pigment, hand-aligned per nail.
details: Soft gel base for a flexible, comfortable wear.

name: Rouge Komal
tagline: The house red. Glossed to a kiss.
description: Our signature scarlet. A warm, slightly orange-leaning red that flatters every undertone.

name: Sheer Petal
description: The lightest pink we make. For days you want only a finish, not a colour.
details: Soft gel, lightweight on the nail.
